title: SurfacePropertyModifier
description: SurfacePropertyModifier: Sets modifiers to a SurfaceProperty. The modifiers are used to scale one or more of the property constants for analysis. Constants are multiplied with the modifiers, hence a modifier value of 1 means no change.

FXX.description: Modifier of the axial stiffness along the local x-axis. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

FYY.description: Modifier of the axial stiffness along the local y-axis. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

FXY.description: Modifier of the the in-plane shear. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

MXX.description: Modifier of the bending stiffness about the local x-axis. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

MYY.description: Modifier of the bending stiffness about the local y-axis. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

MXY.description: Modifier of the in-plane twist stiffness. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

VXZ.description: Modifier of the xz-out of plane shear stiffness. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

VYZ.description: Modifier of the yz-out of plane shear stiffness. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

Mass.description: Modifier of the mass. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

Weight.description: Modifier of the weight. Value of the SurfaceProperty is multiplied by this value, hence 1 means no scaling applied. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
